name: subvibe
description: Use a cheap subagent CLI (Grok Build by default; Antigravity/Gemini included) with cost discipline and verification gates.

plugins.name: subvibe
plugins.description: Routes deterministic, high-volume work (scaffolding, test generation, migrations, bulk reads, web research) to a cheaper subagent CLI (Grok Build by default; Antigravity/Gemini included) via a hardened driver-based wrapper with tiers, background jobs, structured failure codes, digest guards, and verification gates. The conductor keeps the judgement-heavy 20%.
